title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF NASUMI IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DINGLE, PROVINCE OF ILOILO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1012 / 50 OG No. 6, 2377 (June, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1011, June 12, 1954 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF NASUMI IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DINGLE, PROVINCE OF ILOILO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Nasumi in the municipality of Dingle, Province of Iloilo, is hereby converted into a new barrio in the same municipality to be known as the barrio of Nasumi.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 12, 1954.
